title: Electricity and home automation
seoTitle: Electricity and home automation | Instal Berrozpe
seoDescription: Audited service with electricity, home automation, photovoltaic solar energy and energy advice within the current Instal Berrozpe website.
intro: The current website groups this service as electricity and automation solutions for home or business.
summary: It includes electrical installations, home automation, photovoltaic solar energy and energy advice according to the audited content.

benefits.title: Key points
items: Service described for home or business.
Current focus on comfort, security and energy efficiency.
Several solutions grouped inside one audited page.

process.title: Described process
items: Initial contact to explain the need.
Advice on the most suitable solution.
Later support mentioned on the current website.

items.question: What is home automation and how can it help my property?
items.answer: The current website describes it as a system to automate and control lighting, climate, appliances and security.

items.question: Which security systems does the current website mention?
items.answer: The website itself connects this service with alarms and CCTV cameras as part of its broader offer.

items.question: Why is energy advice included in this service?
items.answer: The audited page presents it as a way to optimize consumption and reduce energy costs.

pendingConfirmation: The mention of wifi-controlled equipment appears on the current website and needs editorial validation before becoming a main claim.
Coverage outside the local area is mentioned in general terms and requires geographic definition.
